options.name: -help
options.description: Show this help output, or the help for a specified subcommand

options.name: -chdir
options.description: Switch to a different working directory before executing the given subcommand

options.name: -version
options.description: Show the current Terraform version

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Prepare your working directory for other commands

options.name: -upgrade
options.description: Opt to upgrade modules and plugins as part of their respective installation steps

options.name: -backend
options.description: Configure the backend for this configuration

options.name: -backend-config
options.description: Backend configuration to merge with the backend block in the configuration

options.name: -force-copy
options.description: Suppress prompts about copying state data when initializing a new state backend

options.name: -from-module
options.description: Copy the source module into the target directory before init

options.name: -get
options.description: Download any modules for this configuration

options.name: -lock
options.description: Lock the state file when locking is supported. Defaults to true

options.name: -lock-timeout
options.description: Duration to retry a state lock. Default 0s

options.name: -input
options.description: Ask for input for variables if not directly set

options.name: -migrate-state
options.description: Reconfigure a backend, and attempt to migrate any existing state

options.name: -reconfigure
options.description: Reconfigure a backend, ignoring any saved configuration

options.name: -plugin-dir
options.description: Directory containing plugin binaries. Overrides all default search paths for plugins

options.name: -lockfile
options.description: Set a dependency lockfile mode

options.name: -test-directory
options.description: Set the Terraform test directory, defaults to "tests"

options.name: -no-color
options.description: Disables output with coloring

options.description: Limit the number of parallel resource operations. Defaults to 10

options.description: Update the state prior to checking for differences

options.description: Create a plan that only updates the state, without proposing any resource changes
